commandPolicy: internal lookup only; no new slash command or package script
checksumMode: sha256 over UTF-8 CSV with optional BOM stripped and CRLF/CR normalized to LF

domains.generatedIdStrategy: source path + row index + primary label
domains.canonicalChoice: Use the imported runtime CSV because the available source variants are checksum-identical to the runtime data.
domains.adaptationRationale: Host-neutral pathing is the only adaptation; source variant and runtime rows stay checksum-identical.

domains.generatedIdStrategy: source path + row index + primary label
domains.canonicalChoice: Use local runtime style names with alias keywords for previous source-variant names so retrieval works for both naming sets.
domains.adaptationRationale: Two style names were normalized for current practice while source-variant names remain searchable through keywords.

domains.generatedIdStrategy: source path + row index + primary label
domains.canonicalChoice: Use the package-formatted runtime CSV because row content is identical while checksum stability depends on normalized final newline handling.
domains.adaptationRationale: The source variants differ only by formatting; the runtime CSV preserves all color rows and normalizes the packaged variant checksum.

domains.generatedIdStrategy: source path + row index + primary label
domains.canonicalChoice: Merge web package rows and native source-tree rows into one runtime domain for browser, iOS, Android, and React Native interface coverage.
domains.adaptationRationale: The source variants split web and native interface practices; the runtime CSV is a merged superset so agents do not miss either platform family.

sourceVariants.name: source-tree
sourceVariants.rationale: Native mobile rows are merged with packaged web rows in the runtime superset.

sourceVariants.name: packaged-assets
sourceVariants.rationale: Web rows are merged with native source-tree rows in the runtime superset.

domains.generatedIdStrategy: source path + row index + primary label
domains.canonicalChoice: Use the 105-row runtime/source-tree superset because the packaged variant has 104 rows and lacks the guideline coverage row.
domains.adaptationRationale: The packaged variant is covered by a source-tree superset plus one additional guideline row, preserving icon style and usage coverage.

sourceVariants.name: source-tree
sourceVariants.rationale: Source-tree variant captured for local coverage comparison.

sourceVariants.name: packaged-assets
sourceVariants.rationale: Covered by the runtime/source-tree superset with one additional guideline row.

sourceVariants.name: imported-runtime
sourceVariants.rationale: Runtime CSV used by design-intelligence search and checked by this manifest.

domains.generatedIdStrategy: source path + row index + primary label
domains.canonicalChoice: Use the 34-row runtime/source-tree landing pattern superset because it fixes malformed packaged rows and keeps the additional modern patterns searchable.
domains.adaptationRationale: The packaged variant has fewer rows and malformed trailing content; the runtime CSV is a sanitized superset with complete landing pattern coverage.

excludedAssets.rationale: Low-signal backup-style data; excluded from default lookup to reduce noise.
Draft note data; excluded from default lookup.
Font binaries and sidecar licenses require separate asset-pack approval.
Script behavior is ported selectively to Node validators; original scripts are not runtime dependencies.
CLI detection/template lessons only; installer/update command behavior is not imported.

excludedAssets.path: preview assets, screenshot assets, ci workflow assets
excludedAssets.rationale: Demo, screenshots, and CI do not belong in plugin runtime.
